texto: Perfect… is a moment. Not a life. You don’t get to perfect with long conversations and a shitty job and a high school sweet heart. Perfect comes, and it goes. Perfect is a moment. It comes, you make the most of it, and then you let it go.
explicacao: Citação de J.D. Hawkins sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Perfect… is a moment. Not a life.
